name: Mario's Pizzeria
subtitle: Wood-Fired Pizza
tagline: 48-hour fermented dough, San Marzano tomatoes, and fresh mozzarella — straight from Naples to Leeds.
pageTitle: Mario's Pizzeria — Wood-Fired Pizza in Leeds
menuIntroText: Wood-fired, hand-stretched, and baked at 485°C in 90 seconds. Honest Neapolitan pizza, no shortcuts.

items.name: Margherita
items.desc: San Marzano tomato, fresh mozzarella, basil, extra virgin olive oil

items.name: Diavola
items.desc: Tomato, mozzarella, spicy salami, Calabrian chili, honey drizzle

items.name: Funghi & Truffle
items.desc: Mixed wild mushrooms, truffle cream, mozzarella, fresh thyme

items.name: Prosciutto e Rucola
items.desc: Mozzarella base, Parma ham, rocket, shaved Parmesan

items.name: Tiramisu della Casa
items.desc: Our family recipe — espresso-soaked savoiardi, mascarpone, cocoa

items.name: Cannoli Siciliani
items.desc: Crispy shells filled with sweet ricotta, pistachio, candied orange

reservationNote: We release tables 30 days in advance. Friday and Saturday typically fill within 48 hours.
footerNote: Proud members of the Associazione Verace Pizza Napoletana.
aboutParagraphs: Mario brought his grandfather's pizza recipe from a tiny shop in Naples to the heart of Leeds in 2012. What started as a single wood-fired oven has grown into one of Yorkshire's most beloved pizzerias.
We make everything from scratch — our dough ferments for 48 hours, our mozzarella is stretched by hand, and every pizza is baked at 485°C for exactly 90 seconds.
No shortcuts. No compromises. Just honest, incredible pizza.

whyChooseItems.text: 48-hour cold fermentation — maximum flavour, easy digestion
AVPN certified — the gold standard for Neapolitan pizza
5★ Food Hygiene rating — inspected every 6 months
180+ five-star reviews — check our Google profile

reviews.name: Tom Harrison
reviews.text: Best pizza outside of Italy. The crust is absolutely perfect — charred, chewy, and impossibly light.

reviews.name: Anna Kowalski
reviews.text: We drive 40 minutes for Mario's. The Diavola with honey is life-changing. Worth every mile.

reviews.name: The Patels
reviews.text: Took the kids here for a birthday dinner and Mario himself came out to say hello. Proper family-run gem.

story.title: From Naples to Leeds
paragraphs: Mario brought his grandfather's pizza recipe from a tiny shop in Naples to the heart of Leeds in 2012. What started as a single wood-fired oven has grown into one of Yorkshire's most beloved pizzerias.
We make everything from scratch — our dough ferments for 48 hours, our mozzarella is stretched by hand, and every pizza is baked at 485°C for exactly 90 seconds.
No shortcuts. No compromises. Just honest, incredible pizza.
